countingRules.modId: one unique affixId/sourceModId after runtime deduplication
countingRules.statCombination: one ordered statId sequence per mod; equal sequences count once
countingRules.template: one language template with placeholders and conditions, not one rendered roll
countingRules.multiline: one mod with more than one stat line
countingRules.baseType: one unique baseItemId in generated base-item files
countingRules.itemClass: one unique itemClassId referenced by runtime mods

sources.germanItemTexts: not found in documented official exports
sources.uncertainty: No official German item-localization export was identified; absence beyond reviewed documentation is Unbekannt.

sources.matching: direct Stat-ID plus conditions/placeholders is structurally strong; Mod-ID comes from mods.json, not the translation row
sources.gameDataStatus: GGG-derived; no separate German-text redistribution grant identified
sources.approval: pending for all German text scopes

sources.newerCandidate: No newer commit existed at audit time; remote HEAD equalled the pinned commit.
sources.socketableStats: augments parser renders language-specific text but does not export structured StatsValues/BondedStatsValues
sources.gameDataStatus: parser license does not license generated GGG text
sources.approval: architecture/control only; no German production import

sources.technicalFeasibility: RePoE supports an explicit local Content.ggpk and German relational reader; reproducible extraction is plausible but was not executed.
sources.repositoryDataset: blocked until separate evidence and approval

sources.technicalIds: not proven for a complete German mapping
sources.gameDataStatus: GGG-visible text plus community presentation; reuse terms Unbekannt

sources.technicalRelation: English runtime/parser strings and internal mod names; no complete German ID mapping
sources.codeLicense: MIT; bundled game data remains separately attributed/restricted

sources.languageSupport: CSD parser records languages_available including German but deliberately emits English templates only
sources.technicalIds: present for stat descriptions and mods; no complete localized base/item-class product
sources.gameDataStatus: maintainer-extracted GGG data; no separate redistribution grant identified

matchingStrategies.directStatId: source-id-verified when locale, pin, condition and placeholder variant are also verified
matchingStrategies.directModId: source-id-verified only if localized record explicitly carries the same Mod ID
matchingStrategies.normalizedStructureHash: control signal after canonical IDs/conditions/placeholders, never sole source proof
matchingStrategies.manualIdMatch: manually-id-matched; production requires dual-reviewed and approved source scope

photoModeFitness.directGermanStatTemplates: potentially suitable after approval: placeholders, signs, percentages, conditions and multi-stat order are representable
photoModeFitness.currentPinnedExport: not suitable for German OCR because German templates are empty
photoModeFitness.manualMapping: technically useful but not scalable or complete without tooling and dual review
photoModeFitness.ocrRule: OCR yields candidates; it must never create a new technical ID

representativeExamples.result: technical source match possible; German text absent at pin
ordered ID combination and conditions required; text equality is insufficient
exact metadata ID required; visible name alone is insufficient

uncertainties: Exact German game-data completeness for a locally installed, pinned client is Unbekannt because no installation was available and no extraction was run.
Permission to publish a derived German text dataset is Unbekannt; software licenses do not resolve game-text rights.
Official availability of an undocumented German item localization export is Unbekannt.
No coverage estimate is assigned to PoE2DB, PoB or local installation without an ID-complete dataset.
